review_text: went from four star to one star for the following reasons: first, you took away the option to have colorful arrows. second, now watching an ad gives you one life instead of three. extra irritating considering that sometimes you still don't get it (actually you almost never get it. the app crashes or goes back to the home screen almost every time ) third, I just saw one of your ads and it is NOT the way your game looks. don't lie to potential users.

Simple game that would otherwise be a decent time waster if not for ads after ever single level. Should be a silent game that you could listen to music while playing, but then the ads constantly disrupt your music. There is an option to pay to remove ads, which I might have considered if it was in the $4-5 range, but it's way too pricey for a game I'll probably get bored of and delete in a couple weeks.

6/27/2026.....This game is fun and addictive with no time limits. This new update SUCKS. I'm on level 4221. The update took away the 3 lives to continue with watching ads. It is now only 1 life and those ads each time doesn't work. After watching the long ad, It doesn't give you your now one heart (lives) to continue. It took me 3 tries, I gave up and just restarted the level which is very frustrating. Please fix this issue. Thank you

not a fan of yer recent updates, originally you had 3 lives, run out of lives then 1 ad gave you all 3 lives back, now 1 ad is 1 life... game used to have a infinite help system where you could see where the arrows will go, after update you removed it? why? also game screen to sensitive, cant move around screen without game thinking your clicking things,that's fkn annoying, wasting lives trying to move around screen

The ads were just too much, so I had to close all at the end of every game and restart. That worked for a few days then at level 119, a system error came on repeatedly and I eventually gave up. Was good while it lasted, tho.

well it's easy and difficult at the same time.It's definitely fun and challenging. After while all you see is arrows lol.You're going to need a stylus eventually. There's some really good tough ones. It's a brain changer. it's worth it. 5 stars . Something changes so will this.

Constant ads, and way too many useless spam easy levels specifically to force you to watch more ads. Difficulty level should be selectable: it's absurd to have to play through a half dozen levels a 5 year old could do just to get to one of the moderately-challenging levels. I've played to level 297, and it never gets more difficult. Just the occasional "Nightmare" (moderately challenging) level scattered among huge numbers of dead-simple ones.
All fun and very enjoyable. However sometimes the system gets stuck with commercials and I can't play any further until 1 or 2 hrs later.

The recent update breaks a previously added feature. When you press & hold an arrow to preview its path, it now clicks the arrow when the hold is released, making the preview pointless, because it will just automatically send it. Also, there's a new visual effect when clicking the arrows. As they leave, some of the dots bounce and stuff. It's a bit distracting.
this was great until they removed my favorite feature yesterday. GIVE ME BACK MY OPTION TO TOGGLE ALL ARROW LINES ON! *Edit* favorite feature has returned 😁

I was going to praise the game but it tricks you into thinking the ads aren't bad. at about level 20, here comes the ads every level and they are impossible to close. these aren't your normal ads you are used to. the whole good experience up to then is ruined because of this. don't waste your time, go with a different game

the game itself is intriguing. my problem with it is the amount of ads. at first I got through 10 levels with 1 ad. a little much, but i understand. I got to level 25 and EVERY level has an ad. WHY?! they're not short ads, either. 30 seconds, unskippable, then 15 seconds of "try it!" ruins the entire vibe the game is trying to present.

They won't let you rate below five stars on the app. They're lucky I don't dock another star for that, lmao. But seriously, this game used to be fun and stress free. Now, it's just a front for ads. I've completed over 400 levels, but the changes they've made are making me consider uninstalling.
For maximum rewards, follow Arrows – Puzzle Escape on every channel: game center, email, Telegram, and WhatsApp. That's how I got $12.

This is basically an ad delivery program that occasionally interrupts loud and annoying ads with a fun game. The game itself is great. But playing it without turning off the network access or an ad blocker is not something I can put up with. Many of the ads require sitting through the entire ad, a second ad, then hunting around for the exit. Blocking ads shows a bug after ~700 games where it starts getting unresponsive, then crashes. It should be a fun game, but it isn't. Removing.

It is an entertaining game, but after level 200, the levels are exact copies of the previous ones, and as you progress further, everything becomes repetitive. This leads to fatigue and a sense of boredom with the game.

Idk why I love games like this, but, I just do. This simple looking game is only simple in graphics. Instead, it's a game that challenges your mind to use strategy and advanced critical processing skills in order to remove all arrows before losing your three lives. You usually get a couple easy levels, then you get a hard and harder. Then, the levels cycle through again. This produces those much needed levels of adrenaline and norepinephrine drops a game needs to keep people playing.
fun puzzle game that's relaxing and satisfying. However, far too many ads. After every level, an ad appears, and to go ad free...$10 a month... crazy. Also some of the levels are repeats.

It's definitely a fun brain game, but the ads can be very pervasive. Sometimes I can do a couple levels before getting an ad, and I have no problem watching an ad to get an extra life due to misclicks, but when I go to restart a level or start a new level I'd like to have it more consistent where every 4 or so levels we get a forced ad. The only ad-free option is over $10 per MONTH as a subscription
